stem: If 800 customers register for new accounts at a music streaming service every day, what fraction of the first 20,000 new accounts are registered in the first 5 days?
rationale: Choice A is correct. In 5 days, 800 × 5 = 4,000 customers register. Therefore the fraction of the first 20,000 accounts registered in the first 5 days is 4,000/20,000 = 1/5. Choice B is incorrect because 1/4 would correspond to 5,000 accounts in 5 days. Choice C is incorrect because 4/5 is the fraction registered after the first 5 days. Choice D is incorrect because 2/5 would correspond to 8,000 accounts in 5 days.
